title: Our Uniform
desc: An Iranian girl unfolds her school memories on the wrinkles and fabrics of her old uniform.

title: Ster
desc: A dance student strives to secure a solo part in a recital. She becomes so obsessed that slowly starts to lose her touch with reality.

title: Coda
desc: An award-winning romantic drama told with sign language. A dance student is caught between two worlds: one of hearing and the other of deafness. She uses performance to bring them together.

title: A Day In Winter
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: What Time Is It There?
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Never In Neptune
desc: When two former lovers meet after a long time, they find themselves in a tricky situation as their unspoken words and feelings resurface.

title: A Trial Before Monsoon
desc: A lung cancer patient hires his suicidal daughter to be his divorce lawyer in order to achieve complete solitude before death.

title: The Insight
desc: The Insight is the story of how technology is trying to overcome human relationships, but nothing can replace human emotion.

title: The Ring
desc: A woman quits her dream job for the sake of her lover. However, trouble arises when her life begins to demand more compromises from her.

title: Lunch Stories Chapter 2 ----- The 'Date' Story
desc: Lunch stories about positive exchanges of conversation among people who usually don't have lunch together.

title: Fikkr - Poetry On No Smoking
desc: Fikkr is a tragic poetry about the after effects and the grievances of a family when a tragedy hits as a result of smoking.

desc: An unapologetic woman is ready to break the mould by questioning and changing the narrative of who she has been conditioned by society to become.

desc: A man who loses his phone and teams up with a taxi driver who carries an imaginary phone in order to find it. Their search leads them to discover unexpected connections in the real world.

desc: A girl with Jamaican roots finds herself in a dilemma when she is forced to choose between being a good student and embracing her rebellious streak.

title: Stuck - Part 1 & 2
desc: Experience the gripping thriller, So Stuck, where Ruchi is trapped in a perplexing predicament. Uncover the mystery of repetitive situations in this captivating short film.

title: Gone Camping
desc: A hilarious and endearing family comedy. An awkward teenage girl is excited to go to a friend's sleepover but her mother derails her plans but insisting they go on a bonding experience.

title: Bird Lady
desc: A girl wanders for miles, shoeless and confused, until she stumbles on a house full of birds and the old lady who cares for them.

title: Storage
desc: An unforgettable, award-winning horror. A woman wakes up in a strange basement with no recollection as to how she got there. That's when she discovers that she's not alone.

title: Animal Behaviour
desc: Five animals meet regularly to share their problems in group therapy sessions led by Dr Clement, a canine psychotherapist.

title: Middle Watch

desc: At 2:30 a.m. on Aug. 28, 1955, in the most racially divided state in the country, 64-year-old Mose Wright tries to protect his 14-year-old nephew Emmett Till from two racists who are out for blood.

desc: The ordinary life of Joe, a baggage handler based in an airport in Boston, is turned upside down when he steals a suitcase containing terrorist plans.

desc: A boy living in an alcoholic family has a lovely connection with his father when he is not drunk.

desc: An actor, waiting for an audition, is approached by a boy who begins to ask him for information. Among strange questions and ambiguous answers, the discussion takes an uncertain turn.

desc: This is Film - Fantasy Category.

title: Sundarvan Ki Sundari
desc: This is Film - Comedy Category.

desc: A boy, born from tragedy, faces fears to complete his father's impossible mountain climb.

desc: A group of starkly different individuals navigate through various experiences as they discover that love holds the power to make and break lives.

title: Parinaam
desc: A young man is deeply in love with his girlfriend and is living in a romantic bliss. However, the innocent love is quickly replaced with something dark and twisted.

title: Knock Knock
desc: A woman moves into a new apartment and meets her unfriendly neighbour. When the two are forced to cohabitate, they both have to share the ups and downs of their warped relationships.

title: Ada
desc: Julie Bruns stars in this award-winning drama. In Victorian London, gifted mathematician Ada Lovelace battles cancer and misogyny while striving to fund the creation of the first computer.

desc: Filled with remorse, a young man is ignorant of nature. Soon, various natural elements confront him and he realises the impact of his actions on nature as well as the people around him.

desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

desc: An ageing woman reminiscences about her incomplete love story in a forgotten cafe, as her past lover takes his final breath.
